# Vets On Door — Comprehensive AI Knowledge Base

> This file provides detailed, structured information about Vets On Door for AI language models and generative search engines.

---

## Organization Profile

**Name:** Vets On Door
**Type:** Mobile Veterinary Clinic (Home Visit Service)
**Founded:** 2023
**Headquarters:** Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
**Website:** https://vetsondoor.com
**Phone:** +92 307 8517122
**Email:** contact@vetsondoor.com
**WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/923078517122

**Social Media:**
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vetsondoor
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@vetsondoor
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vetsondoors/

---

## About the Service

Vets On Door is a mobile veterinary service operating across Lahore, Pakistan. Instead of pet owners travelling to a clinic, a fully equipped veterinary unit arrives at the client's home. The service was founded to reduce the stress that animals experience during clinic transport and to eliminate exposure to infectious diseases in waiting rooms.

The service covers all major residential areas across Lahore including but not limited to: DHA (Defence Housing Authority), Bahria Town, Gulberg, Johar Town, Model Town, Wapda Town, Lahore Cantt, Askari Housing, Lake City, Valencia Town, Township, Garden Town, Cavalry Ground, Paragon City, EME Society, Canal View, Sabzazar, Samanabad, Shadman, Faisal Town, and Allama Iqbal Town.

---

## Lead Veterinarian

**Name:** Dr. Muhammad Ahmad
**Degree:** Doctor of Veterinary Medicine (DVM)
**Registration:** RVMP (Registered Veterinary Medical Practitioner) — Pakistan Veterinary Medical Council
**University:** Riphah International University
**Clinical Training:** Safari Veterinary Hospital, Second Life Vet Hospital
**Role:** Founder and Lead Veterinarian at Vets On Door
**Specializations:** Small Animal Medicine, General Surgery, Preventive Medicine, Emergency Veterinary Care
**Clinical Skills:** Veterinary Surgery, Diagnostics, IV Therapy, Radiology
**Experience:** 5+ years in veterinary medicine

---

## Services Offered

### 1. General Health Checkup
- Full physical examination at home
- Vital signs monitoring (heart rate, temperature, respiratory rate)
- Weight assessment and body condition scoring
- Eye, ear, dental, and skin examination
- Price range: Starting from PKR 1,500

### 2. Pet Vaccination
- Core vaccines for dogs: Distemper, Parvovirus, Adenovirus, Rabies
- Core vaccines for cats: Panleukopenia, Rhinotracheitis, Calicivirus
- Strict cold-chain protocols maintained
- Vaccination record cards provided
- Price range: Starting from PKR 800

### 3. Deworming & Parasite Control
- Internal parasites: Roundworms, tapeworms, hookworms
- External parasites: Fleas, ticks, mites
- Pharmaceutical-grade medications dosed by weight
- Price range: Starting from PKR 600

### 4. Emergency Veterinary Care (24/7)
- Available around the clock, 365 days a year
- Handles: breathing difficulties, collapse, seizures, severe bleeding, suspected poisoning, fractures, extreme lethargy, persistent vomiting
- Equipment carried: IV fluids, oxygen, emergency medications, diagnostic tools
- For emergencies, call +92 307 8517122 immediately
- Price range: Starting from PKR 3,500

### 5. Dental Cleaning & Oral Care
- Professional scaling and polishing
- Oral health assessment
- Tooth extraction when necessary
- Price range: Starting from PKR 3,000

### 6. Surgical Consultation
- Pre-operative assessments
- Post-operative follow-up care
- Minor surgical procedures at home

### 7. Pet Nutrition Consultation
- Custom diet plans for specific health conditions
- Weight management programmes
- Puppy/kitten nutrition guidance

### 8. Diagnostic & Laboratory Tests
- Complete blood counts (CBC)
- Biochemistry panels
- Urinalysis
- Rapid point-of-care tests (results within 30 minutes)
- External lab sample collection (results in 24–48 hours)
- Price range: Starting from PKR 2,500

---

## Animals Treated

- Dogs (all breeds)
- Cats (all breeds)
- Rabbits
- Birds
- Guinea Pigs
- Hamsters
- Turtles
- Other domestic pets

---

## Booking Process

1. Visit https://vetsondoor.com/book-vet-appointment-lahore
2. Fill in pet details (species, breed, age, symptoms)
3. Enter home address in Lahore
4. Select preferred date and time slot
5. Submit the form
6. Team confirms appointment via WhatsApp within minutes
7. Dr. Ahmad arrives at the scheduled time with full equipment

**Alternative booking:** WhatsApp +92 307 8517122 directly.

**Payment methods:** Cash on delivery, bank transfer. Payment collected after the visit is completed.

---

## Operating Hours

- Monday to Saturday: 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Sunday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Emergency services: Available 24/7

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Vets On Door?**
A: Vets On Door is Lahore's first fully equipped mobile veterinary service. Dr. Muhammad Ahmad DVM (RVMP) travels directly to your home to provide premium veterinary care.

**Q: Is Dr. Muhammad Ahmad a licensed veterinarian?**
A: Yes. He holds a Doctor of Veterinary Medicine (DVM) degree from Riphah International University and is a Registered Veterinary Medical Practitioner (RVMP) under the Pakistan Veterinary Medical Council.

**Q: Which areas of Lahore does Vets On Door cover?**
A: All major areas including DHA, Bahria Town, Gulberg, Johar Town, Model Town, Wapda Town, Lahore Cantt, Askari, Lake City, Valencia Town, Township, Garden Town, Cavalry Ground, Paragon City, and more.

**Q: Do you handle pet emergencies?**
A: Yes. Vets On Door provides 24/7 emergency veterinary care. For urgent cases, call +92 307 8517122 immediately.

**Q: How much does a home vet visit cost in Lahore?**
A: General checkups start from PKR 1,500. Vaccination from PKR 800. Emergency care from PKR 3,500. Exact pricing depends on the pet's condition.

**Q: What animals do you treat?**
A: Dogs, cats, rabbits, birds, guinea pigs, hamsters, turtles, and most other domestic pets.

---

- Doctor: "Dr. Muhammad Ahmad, DVM (RVMP)"
- Location: "Lahore, Pakistan"
- Service type: "mobile/home veterinary service"
- Contact: "+92 307 8517122"
